name: Lily's Salon
tagline: Hair, color, skin & spa in the heart of Sebastopol
seoDescription: Lily's Salon in Sebastopol, CA is a full-service hair and day spa owned by Lisa Houston

contact.address: 145 Pleasant Hill Avenue North, Suite 101, Sebastopol, CA 95472

sections.heading: A salon Sebastopol has trusted for years
sections.subheading: Owner-led haircuts, color, facials and waxing from a tight-knit team of artists who know your hair by name.
badges: Owned and operated by Lisa Houston, a hair
Full-service salon and day spa: hair, color

items.title: Cuts & Styling
items.description: Precision haircuts for adults and kids, clipper cuts, bang trims, blow-dry styles and special-occasion up-dos, shaped to your hair and how you actually wear it.

items.title: Color & Balayage
items.description: Single-process tint, partial and full highlights, hand-painted balayage and custom toners — natural, sun-kissed dimension or a bold new direction, done with care.

items.title: Hair Health Treatments
items.description: Olaplex to repair broken bonds, Malibu to clear mineral build-up, and deep-conditioning treatments using naturally inspired Eufora products for stronger, healthier hair.

items.title: Facials & Skin Care
items.description: From the Signature and Mini facial to anti-aging, acne and ultra-pampering treatments and Jan Marini peels, delivered by licensed estheticians Nancy and Amber.

items.title: Waxing & Hair Removal
items.description: Brow, lip and full-face waxing, underarm, bikini, custom and Brazilian, and lower, upper or full-leg waxing — clean, meticulous and comfortable.

items.title: Perms & Specialty
items.description: Perms and finishing touches, plus makeup and a curated shelf of Eufora products to keep your color and style looking salon-fresh between visits.

sections.heading: Meet Lisa and the Lily's family
body: Lily's Salon is a full-service salon and day spa in Sebastopol, owned and operated by Lisa Houston. Lisa has worked in the creative field since 1985 and sharpened her craft through advanced training with Vidal Sassoon, Toni & Guy, Pivot Point, Gary Gerrard, Wella Professional Hair Color and Eufora Concepts. She treats every client as a new canvas, listening carefully to what you want before she ever picks up the shears — which is why so many of her clients have followed her for well over a decade.

Behind the chairs is a small, talented team. Clara Marlow brings eighteen years of cutting and color expertise; Eliana Ponek lives for creating bold, exciting color. On the skin-care side, estheticians Nancy Giacobbe of Belladonna Skin Care and Amber Burke of Amber Rose Skin Care round out the spa menu with facials and waxing. The salon leans on naturally inspired Eufora products and a warm, unhurried atmosphere, so a visit feels less like an appointment and more like catching up with people who genuinely care how you look and feel.
highlights: Owned and operated by Lisa Houston, a hair artist and colorist in the craft since 1985
Full-service salon and day spa: hair, color, facials, waxing and makeup under one roof
Balayage, highlights, tint and corrective color, plus Olaplex and Malibu treatments
Naturally inspired Eufora products chosen for the health and nourishment of your hair
